title: Amazon Basics Premium Multifunctional Kitchen Shears, Black
features: Multifunction kitchen shears come apart only when you want them to
Sharp blades make easy work of any cutting task
Ideal for cutting, scaling, peeling, removing caps and cracking nuts
Ergonomic non-slip grip for enhanced safety
description: From the manufacturer AmazonBasics premium multifunctional kitchen shears A must-have for any busy kitchen, the AmazonBasics premium multifunctional kitchen shears offer exceptionally versatile everyday convenience. Whether hung from a hook or stored in a drawer, the handy tool will quickly become a go-to favourite for getting the job done. Use the kitchen shears for opening packages, clipping string, snipping fresh herbs or cutting wire or small bones. The innovative design also allows for scaling fish, peeling potatoes, carrots and other vegetables, or opening bottle caps. Stubborn twist-off caps remove easily as well, thanks to grippy steel teeth in the middle the shears' handle, which are also effective for cracking seafood or nuts. Hand-wash only Hand-wash using warm water and a mild detergent. Rinse and dry thoroughly before reconnecting the two pieces. Details: Sharp blades make easy work of any cutting task Ideal for cutting, scaling, peeling, removing bottle caps and more Ergonomic non-slip grip for enhanced safety Sharp cutting blades Equipped with reliably sharp steel blades, the premium kitchen shears quickly cut through bones, ribs, chicken wings and meat, as well as garden-fresh vegetables, packages and cardboard boxes. No more searching for household scissors or dealing with dull blades thanks to the AmazonBasics multifunctional kitchen shears. Ergonomic non-slip grip Comfortably contoured, the kitchen shears come with an ergonomic non-slip grip to promote precise results, ultimate control and safe use. The grip also offers a seamless design, which allows for thorough cleaning and hygienic use. Come-apart design The AmazonBasics premium multifunctional kitchen shears feature a unique design that allows them to come apart when you want them to. Both pieces can be used individually for opening bottles, peeling vegetables, scaling fish and more - or they can be securely connected for use as a pair of scissors for a wide range of cutting tasks. The shears' come-apart design offers the added bonus of thorough cleaning between use. In the box: - AmazonBasics premium multifunctional kitchen shears
